raw_candidates.label: Live Raid Coordination Loop
raw_candidates.description: A system for orchestrating live raid timing, role assignment, and post-run adaptation for game communities.

raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next live raid coordination loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Players repeatedly need lightweight coordination in live events, but most communities still rely on messy chat threads.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Players repeatedly need lightweight coordination in live events, but most communities still rely on messy chat threads.
